rationale: The cited paper appears conceptually close to the citing study: both examine governance choices in complex industrial B2B systems and explicitly involve modularity and control/allocation decisions (cited: vendor customization control; citing: contract specificity under multicomponent architecture and mix-and-match). Given this overlap and the cited paper’s model of determinants/performance consequences of control choices, it is plausibly a theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention, even though the raw evidence only confirms a DOI-matched reference.
